body.content:
Dear Hexaware Vendor Support,

This is my THIRD follow-up regarding Invoice #INV-2026-0038 (PO#98765) which is now 45 days overdue.

Invoice Details:
- Invoice Number: INV-2026-0038
- PO Number: PO#98765
- Amount: $120,000 USD
- Invoice Date: February 10, 2026
- Due Date: March 12, 2026
- Days Overdue: 45

We have not received any payment or communication despite two previous emails sent on March 12 and March 20. This delay is causing significant cash flow issues for our organization.

If payment is not processed within the next 5 business days, we will be forced to:
1. Suspend all ongoing project deliverables
2. Escalate to our legal department
3. Apply late payment penalties as per our contract terms (1.5% per month)

Please treat this as a matter of highest priority.

Regards,
Priya Sharma
CFO, Tech Solutions India Pvt. Ltd.
Direct: +91-22-4567-8901
Email: priya.sharma@techsolutions.in
